_comment: Example policy data shapes. Real IDs must come from the staging environment — never commit actual IDs here. Ask QA lead or backend dev to seed these in staging before running Blender tests.

monthly._note: Used for: happy path Monthly → Semi-Annual, Dialog content (From=Monthly)

semi_annual._note: Used for: happy path Semi-Annual → Monthly, Dialog content (From=Semi-Annual)

cancelled._note: Used for: verifying Change Payment Plan option is disabled on cancelled policies

last_month._note: Used for financial message scenario — payment was last month
